meaning: n.[植]野碗豆,毒麦,皮重vt.称皮重
examples: What tare they? They are giraffes.
Net weight: the gross weight less tare.
The group officially became a band in 2000, with the members each adopting new names: Avey Tare (David Portner), Panda Bear (Noah Lennox), Deakin (Josh Dibb) and Geologist (Brian Weitz).
